title: Tomy Plarail Edward — motor and wiring
itemDetails:
Tomy (Takara Tomy) Plarail / Thomas & Friends battery-operated Edward the Blue Engine (Engine No. 2). Edward: blue cab and side tanks, cream boiler, red running board/chassis, red funnel, yellow roof; yellow circle with red 2 on cab. Motorized chassis with blue drive wheels, internal white plastic gearbox, on/off and wiring to battery box; typical power: one AA (varies by year—1990s–2010s Plarail and TrackMaster/Fisher-Price revisions differ). Client childhood heirloom for grandchildren. Failure modes on aged units: disconnected motor leads, missing wires, hair/carpet fibre packed in axles, dried grease. Market: common Thomas motorised engine; many reissues (TS-02 etc.). Sources: Plarail/Thomas collector references.

Photo/product ID T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
repairDetails:
Tomy Plarail Edward engine — motor wires and gear clean.

Identified T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
